title: mentha longifolia subsp. polyadena
intro: Mentha longifolia subsp. polyadena, also known as spike mint or horse mint, is a subspecies of the Mentha longifolia plant, a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Mentha longifolia subsp. polyadena include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
